claim.summary: Lane 2 emitted updated pose/depth control semantics for strict body-contact wiring: local overlap/containment metrics are provisional preflight checks only, while named per-hand edges and actor-body collision remain blocked without trustworthy same-scene masks.

inputs.prompt_text: Contact control and pose/depth preflight constraints for strict body-contact.

settings.runtime_required: current-hash runtime validation required for acceptance

artifacts.description: Lane 1 wiring packet documenting provisional pose/depth thresholds and explicit non-proven claims.
Lane 1 request preserving placeholder/off semantics and blocker boundaries.
Refined runtime acceptance request with explicit checks for placeholders, node 1009 handling, previews, and aux-asset visibility.
Compact status for the runtime handoff slice.
Base pixel QA output referenced by the handoff.

checks.name: pose_depth_thresholds_declared
checks.notes: Overlap and containment thresholds are declared for provisional preflight and tied to runtime acceptance.

checks.name: per_hand_named_edges_blocked
checks.notes: Named left/right per-hand edges are explicitly blocked in wiring documents until same-scene split masks arrive.

checks.name: actor_body_zero_control_preserved
checks.notes: Actor-body zero-off behavior at node 1009 is preserved as intentional fallback control.

checks.name: runtime_visual_dependency_preserved
checks.notes: No final visual/contact acceptance is claimed without runtime proof and Lane 5 visual review.

checks.name: handoff_coverage
checks.notes: Lane 1 receives explicit semantics and thresholds; runtime lane still needs evidence collection.

failure_reasons: Same-scene nonzero per-hand left/right split masks remain unavailable.
Same-scene actor-body mask for node 1009 remains unavailable.

blockers.description: Per-hand split mask source remains missing; named per-hand edges cannot be validated.
blockers.next_action: Provide same-scene nonzero Character A/B left/right hand segmentation or keep edge mode blocked.

blockers.description: Node 1009 remains zero/off and full actor-body collision/deformation validation is incomplete.
blockers.next_action: Provide same-scene actor-body source before lifting actor-body collision blockers.
